text:
There once was a curious little squirrel named Squeaker. Every day after school, she’d scurry down to the creek for a swim and nibble on some juicy roots.

One particularly hot summer day, after a lengthy swim, Squeaker decided to take a little nap by the bank. As she dozed, she dreamt of a magical meadow where flowers bloomed all year-round and a wise old owl welcomed her with a cheerful caw. The owl told her tales of ancient spells and secrets hidden within the leaves.

Awakening, she found herself back at the creek. It seemed no spell had transferred her to that dreamy meadow. Defeated but not dismayed, Squeaker thought about what the wise owl had said.

One afternoon, she decided to gather some fallen sticks. As she walked home along the creek path, she realized she had an idea. Late that night, back at her hideout in a hollow tree, Squeaker collected stones and dried
